results.title: Orus
results.author: Exa

properties.name: Orus
properties.description:
We are on a mission to offer simple, affordable, and tailored insurance coverage to European SMBs to give them the peace of mind to focus on what matters. 

We want to revolutionize the way SMBs interact with insurance with great UX, total transparency, prevention and assistance.

highlights:
Orus is a Insurance company. Orus employs 92 people (+64.6% YoY, +51 people) and has an annual revenue of $3.1M, founded in 2022. Headquartered in Paris, France, operates in 5 countries (including Spain, Germany, United States, and United Arab Emirates). Has $45.9M in total funding, most recently a Series B in July 2025, with 3 prior funding rounds.   ...    - Homepage: orus.eu
